== Notes for [[Item:Q103410|Q103410]] ==

Mayor FLORES de Guevara24 was born (date unknown).

Spouse: Juan GUTIERREZ de la Caballeria. Mayor FLORES de Guevara and Juan GUTIERREZ de la Caballeria were married. Children were: Marina GUTIERREZ Flores de la Caballeria.

http://www.raullongoria.net/Genealogy/FamilyTree/b74.html#P2301
--------------------
Fuente: Geni, Enrique Villareal

Fuente: http://www.bisabuelos.com According to bisabuelos.com it is uncertain if Pedro Diaz Franco is Marina's father or her brother.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000007566148508

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
